title: various item work
author: lukechampine
body:
These are getting really tough. There are now half a dozen TUs that are just one tricky match away from being linked, but I haven't been able to crack any of them. 😔 

Remaining item TUs: 24
Remaining item functions: 142

title: various item work
author: PsiLupan
body:
Can you give things meaningful names instead of leaving them as "new_var" etc.? I think that's my main complaint about most of this PR.

Even just "pos_copy" is better than "new_var," and it saves having to do this cleanup later.

title: various item work
author: lukechampine
body: fair, a lot of this is permuterslop. I'll give it a cleanup pass.
